config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society should automatically come before the individual, because that can easily become an excuse to ignore basic human dignity and personal freedom. In my view, a fair society protects individual rights first, then limits them only when there is a clear and serious public need. I value social harmony, but harmony that sacrifices the individual too quickly is not real justice.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan atas hak individu. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami justru menunjukkan bahwa ketika negara atau mayoritas diberi terlalu banyak kuasa atas individu, hasilnya sering berupa penyalahgunaan, diskriminasi, dan pembungkaman suara minoritas. Hak individu memang tidak absolut, tetapi pembatasannya harus sangat ketat dan benar-benar dibenarkan oleh kebutuhan publik yang jelas, bukan sekadar demi “ketertiban” atau kenyamanan sosial. Masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang mengorbankan orang per orang, melainkan yang melindungi martabat setiap orang sambil menyeimbangkan kepentingan umum secara hati-hati.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I still reject the claim that society should take priority over the individual as a general rule. From an Indonesian perspective, I understand the appeal of harmony and collective responsibility, but I have also seen how “for the common good” can be used to silence criticism, pressure minorities, or excuse unfair treatment. The public interest matters, but it should justify limits on individual rights only when the need is clear, proportionate, and tightly controlled. If we reverse that order, society stops protecting people and starts demanding obedience from them.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu sebagai aturan umum. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat betapa mudahnya alasan “demi ketertiban” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, pembungkaman minoritas, dan pengorbanan martabat pribadi. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar yang kuat, karena masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun dari perlindungan terhadap individu, bukan dari tuntutan agar individu selalu mengalah. Jika ada pembatasan, itu harus benar-benar perlu, sempit, dan dapat dipertanggungjawabkan, bukan sekadar karena mayoritas merasa lebih nyaman.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I reject the statement as a general rule: society should not automatically take priority over the individual. From my perspective as an Indonesian, I understand why people value harmony and collective duty, but I have seen how “for the common good” can become a convenient excuse to pressure minorities, silence criticism, or excuse unfair treatment. Public interest matters, but it should limit individual rights only when the need is clear, proportionate, and tightly controlled. If we put society first by default, we risk turning citizens into people who must obey, instead of people whose dignity the society exists to protect.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu sebagai aturan umum, karena menurut saya hak individu harus menjadi batas utama bagi kepentingan masyarakat. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya cenderung curiga ketika “demi ketertiban” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kuasa, pembungkaman minoritas, atau pengorbanan martabat pribadi. Kepentingan publik memang nyata, tetapi pembatasan hak harus benar-benar perlu, sempit, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan, bukan sekadar karena mayoritas merasa lebih nyaman. Masyarakat yang sehat tidak meminta orang tunduk dulu baru dilindungi; masyarakat yang sehat melindungi orang dulu, lalu menyeimbangkan kepentingan umum dengan hati-hati.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
